			},
			"24" : {
				"attachs" :
				{
					"child1Offset" : [0.8999786376953125,0,0,0.8999786376953125,17.25,76.15],
					"child1" : [0.8999786376953125,0,0,0.8999786376953125,17.25,-8]
				}
			},

				}
			}
		}
	},
	"Idle3_1" : {
		"attachs" :
